step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("efficacy of Algenpantucel-L in pancreatic cancer")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

First state if you agree/disagree with prior conclusions, then give one sentence justification based on the retrieved material. Finally, select your answer using boxed notation.
\boxed{}
After reviewing the retrieved evidence, I conclude that Algenpantucel-L is not referenced in any of the studies discussed, nor is it mentioned in relation to pancreatic cancer treatments. Although several other therapies such as radiation, chemotherapy combinations, somatostatin analogs, and PRRT are noted for various types of pancreatic cancers—including neuroendocrine tumors—I find no indication of Algenpantucel-L's efficacy in pancreatic adenocarcinoma. Therefore, I maintain disagreement with earlier claims suggesting otherwise.
$\boxed{\text{B}}$
